en_title: 'Please Play Us When GTA 6 Comes Out': Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Developer Teases Post-Game Support
cn_title: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》总监：GTA6发售后也请继续玩
subtitle: 后续支持不会停

paragraphs.en: The director of Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced has told fans to keep playing — even when GTA 6 launches.
paragraphs.cn: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》总监呼吁玩家，即便GTA6发售，也请继续游玩本作。

paragraphs.en: Of course, the hugely-anticipated GTA 6 arrives on November 19, and is expected to gobble up gaming time and attention away from pretty much every major release — so much so that many other developers are steering well clear and launching their games en masse in September and early October.
paragraphs.cn: 备受期待的GTA6将于11月19日发售，预计会从几乎所有大型新作手中夺走玩家的时间和注意力。因此，许多开发商都选择避开它，集中在9月和10月上旬推出游戏。

paragraphs.en: But what about post-launch support for games that have already released, such as Resynced? Asked about the contents of future updates for the newly-launched remake, game director Richard Knight played coy, though mentioned the upcoming New Game Plus mode that publisher Ubisoft previously confirmed.
paragraphs.cn: 但对于《记忆重置》这样已经发售的游戏，后续支持又会如何？当被问及这款刚刚推出的重制版未来会更新哪些内容时，游戏总监Richard Knight卖了个关子，不过提到了发行商育碧此前确认即将推出的「新游戏+」模式。

paragraphs.en: What might follow that remains to be seen. Still, the suggestion that support will continue through GTA 6's November release date is interesting to consider.
paragraphs.cn: 此后还会有什么内容，目前仍有待观察。不过，开发团队暗示会在GTA6于11月发售后继续提供支持，这一点颇值得关注。

paragraphs.en: "I mean, I can't say anything officially, but you know, it doesn't feel like a crazy bet," Knight said, speaking to Assassin's Creed fan YouTuber JorRaptor .
paragraphs.cn: Knight在接受《刺客信条》粉丝油管主JorRaptor采访时表示：「我不能正式透露任何消息，但你也知道，这并不算一个太离谱的猜测。」

paragraphs.en: "I mean, we definitely need to support the game... We need to, you know, fix bugs. Sorry for anyone running into bugs. They hurt. They're painful for us, too. And we do want to add some quality-of-life stuff. So, I mean, it's a pretty reasonable guess. Also, please play us when GTA 6 comes out.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们肯定需要继续支持这款游戏……我们得修复Bug。很抱歉有玩家遇到了Bug，这让人难受，对我们来说也一样。我们还希望加入一些改善游玩体验的内容。所以，这确实是个相当合理的猜测。另外，GTA6发售时也请继续玩我们的游戏。」

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft confirmed last week that a New Game Plus option was coming to Resynced , alongside a celebration of the game hitting 3 million copies sold. "Guess we'll have to keep the adventures going with New Game Plus later on, mates," Ubisoft wrote.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧上周在庆祝《记忆重置》销量达到300万份的同时，确认游戏将加入「新游戏+」选项。育碧写道：「看来之后还得用新游戏+继续这场冒险，伙计们。」

paragraphs.en: "We're working on that right now," Knight said of New Game Plus. "For sure. It's one of the first things. Partly because [Assassin's Creed] Shadows has already built their version, so it's considered a low-risk feature for us. We're still doing the work, so I can't promise exactly a day or anything, but we're definitely working on this one. It's just such a natural thing."
paragraphs.cn: 谈到「新游戏+」时，Knight表示：「我们现在就在做，确定无疑。这是最先着手的内容之一，部分原因是《刺客信条：影》已经做出了自己的版本，因此对我们来说，这项功能的风险较低。工作仍在进行，所以我无法承诺具体日期，但我们肯定在开发它。这本来就是一项很自然的功能。」

paragraphs.en: What else might follow? Perhaps a challenge mode, similar to the option recently added to Assassin's Creed Mirage? This lets fans replay story missions with new, additional objectives, racking up points to unlock additional in-game items and cosmetic options.
paragraphs.cn: 之后还可能加入什么？也许会是类似《刺客信条：幻景》近期新增选项的挑战模式。该模式允许玩家带着新的额外目标重玩剧情任务，通过累计分数解锁更多游戏物品和外观选项。

paragraphs.en: One key request from fans would likely be the original Black Flag's well-received DLC, Freedom Cry, that features a fresh story for first mate Adewale. But this would likely be a major undertaking for Ubisoft, and to date there's been no suggestion this will happen.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝的一项重要诉求很可能是重制原版《黑旗》广受好评的DLC《自由呐喊》，其中讲述了大副阿德瓦勒的新故事。但这对育碧而言可能是一项大型工程，迄今也没有迹象表明它会实现。

paragraphs.en: Until then, there's plenty to keep fans happy in the base game, which IGN gave a 9/10 in our Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced review . "More than just a shinier version of the same game you remember," we wrote, "Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced brings what was already one of the best games in the series up to today’s standards."
paragraphs.cn: 在那之前，本体游戏已经有大量内容足以让粉丝满意。IGN在《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》评测中为其打出9/10分。我们写道：「它不只是把你记忆中的同一款游戏变得更漂亮，《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》还让这部本就是系列最佳作品之一的游戏达到了当今标准。」

paragraphs.en: Before you dive into the Golden Age of Piracy, check out our guides on things to do first and tips and tricks to help Edward Kenway's journey be a smooth one. As you explore the Caribbean, make sure you don't miss a single collectible , especially the shanties to keep you and your crew entertained on the high seas. Blow other ships to smithereens with our and save Reales for your next Jackdaw upgrade to be the mightiest pirate you can be.
paragraphs.cn: 在投身海盗黄金时代之前，不妨查看我们的开局必做事项和技巧攻略，让爱德华·肯威的旅程更加顺利。探索加勒比海时，请确保不要错过任何收藏品，尤其是能让你和船员在海上保持兴致的船歌。把其他船只轰成碎片，并为寒鸦号的下一次升级存下雷亚尔，努力成为最强大的海盗。

opus_summary: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》团队正开发「新游戏+」，并将继续修复Bug、改善体验。总监希望GTA6于11月19日发售后，玩家仍会继续游玩本作。

translated_terms.Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》

pending_dict.reason: 游戏总监姓名，暂无确认的中文译名
